failure_modes.cause: Vapour pressure of TBAB/EG solvent exceeds pump inlet pressure at T = 120°C
failure_modes.mitigation: Pressurise feed reservoir to maintain pressure above vapour pressure of solvent

failure_modes.cause: Precipitation of reaction by-products at high concentration
failure_modes.mitigation: Implement regular cleaning protocol and monitor pressure drop across reactor

failure_modes.cause: BPR valve failure leading to pressure build-up
failure_modes.mitigation: Install pressure relief valve and perform regular BPR maintenance

single_points_of_failure: BPR valve — blockage stops all flow
validation_experiments: Run system at T=120°C with solvent only for 60 min; monitor for pressure fluctuations indicating cavitation
Conduct flow test with inert tracer to detect potential blockages in tubing
Perform BPR valve cycling test to ensure reliable operation under expected conditions
